content.sentence: Tôi ___ gặp anh ấy hôm qua.

exampleSentences: Anh vô tình làm rơi điện thoại khi đang chạy bộ trong công viên.
Chị vô tình gặp lại bạn cũ ở quán cà phê hôm qua.
Em đã vô tình gửi nhầm tin nhắn cho người khác.
notes:
vô tình = accidentally, unintentionally. You didn’t mean to do it.

It usually goes before a verb to show no intention.  

It can also mean heartless / emotionally cold when describing a person’s attitude. In that sense, it acts like an adjective after words like rất.

Strong opposite: cố ý (on purpose). Close idea but different: tình cờ = by chance (more about coincidence than mistake).

content.sentence: Tôi ___ gặp anh ấy hôm qua.

notes_md:
**vô tình** = accidentally, unintentionally. You didn’t mean to do it.

It usually goes before a verb to show no intention.  

It can also mean **heartless / emotionally cold** when describing a person’s attitude. In that sense, it acts like an adjective after words like *rất*.

Strong opposite: **cố ý** (on purpose). Close idea but different: **tình cờ** = by chance (more about coincidence than mistake).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He accidentally dropped his phone while jogging in the park.
She accidentally met an old friend at the coffee shop yesterday.
I accidentally sent the message to the wrong person.

definitions.es: Ocurriendo por casualidad o sin intención.
definitions.vi: Xảy ra một cách tình cờ hoặc không có ý định.

example.en: I accidentally ran into an old friend at the supermarket.
example.es: Me encontré accidentalmente con un viejo amigo en el supermercado.
example.vi: Tôi vô tình gặp lại bạn cũ ở siêu thị.
